comments_target_xor.name: comments_target_xor
comments_target_xor.value: ("comments"."creation_id" IS NOT NULL AND "comments"."profile_steamid" IS NULL) OR ("comments"."creation_id" IS NULL AND "comments"."profile_steamid" IS NOT NULL)

reports_target_xor.name: reports_target_xor
reports_target_xor.value: ("reports"."creation_id" IS NOT NULL AND "reports"."comment_id" IS NULL) OR ("reports"."creation_id" IS NULL AND "reports"."comment_id" IS NOT NULL)
